wiki.summary: “No Security” is the opening track of Baby Keem’s highly anticipated sophomore album, Ca$ino. This track sets the tone, introducing common themes seen throughout the album, such as loss, complex family dynamics, and the pressure associated with being labeled as rap’s “next-up.” Keem explores these issues, inviting listeners into his world with authenticity and vulnerability. Even saying during the Ca$ino Album Listening, “A lot of these stories I’m telling you used to be embarrassing. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “No Security” is the opening track of Baby Keem’s highly anticipated sophomore album, Ca$ino. This track sets the tone, introducing common themes seen throughout the album, such as loss, complex family dynamics, and the pressure associated with being labeled as rap’s “next-up.” Keem explores these issues, inviting listeners into his world with authenticity and vulnerability. Even saying during the Ca$ino Album Listening, “A lot of these stories I’m telling you used to be embarrassing.” This track not only perfectly starts the album, it opens up with a newer, vulnerable era of Keem. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
